title: Projekt Kraft - A Full Fantasy Immersion
description: A full and more complete experience of the world of Projekt Kraft!
body:
== Introduction ==

 

This modpack is intended to be played as a more complete gameplay experience for Projekt Kraft! If you want to inform yourself about Projekt Kraft, click here.

 
= List of the mods the pack has =

Another Furniture: Adds decorative furnitures like lamps, chairs, sofas and such.

Appleskin: Tells you which items are food and how much hunger points they recover.

Basic Weapons: Adds some vanilla-like weapons that don't change the game too much.

Comforts: Adds sleeping bags.

Iron Chest: Adds different kinds of chests that allow you to store even more items inside.

Jade: Tells you the name of every block and mob you're looking at. Also tells you the HP of the mobs you're looking at.

Just Enough Items: Tells you the crafting recipes of everything.

Magic Combat Wands: Adds simple magic wands that allow you to shoot enemies.

Polymorph: Fixes crafting incompatabilities between mods recipes.

Projekt Kraft: Main mod in the pack. Main reason this pack even exists at all.

Rex's Additional Structures: Adds a few basic world decorators, like fallen trees, small ruins, abandoned campsites and such.

Tidal Towns: Adds water villages. Not underwater villages, but villages that are floating on water.

Useful Backpacks: Adds different kinds of backpacks so you can store your stuff inside of them.

Waystones: A mod that adds ''waystones'' to the game. A waystone is a magical pillar that is found in villages that allows you to teleport between one place to another.
